title: Add Wave 28 manager auth/session UX regression matrix
description: Expand QA coverage for manager login UX hardening, auth session success metadata, invalid credential handling, and unauthorized or session-expired recovery while preserving prior manager parity waves.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix covers blank login UX assumptions, invalid credentials, login success, me success, refresh success, and unauthorized/session-expired recovery paths
API tests assert auth-session-v1 success metadata and error stability for manager flows
Existing manager parity regressions remain stable after Wave 28 coverage is added
